creator: fabian@wenks.ch
text:
Hello

This modification was discussed and tested in the fail2ban-users 
mailing list. Please see the thread "bsd ipfw" [1]. It does not 
take away the option to create your own firewall rules for 
fail2ban. It is just a possibility for an easy setup for those 
who do not want to create their own firewall rules.

   [1] http://sourceforge.net/mailarchive/message.php?msg_id=30737604


bye
Fabian
